rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description as it accurately captures 'Arrearagia' and the trailing dash seen in the image. Other extractors missed the dash or misread 'Arrearagia'. Confirmed 'header' type as no amounts are present.

All extractors agreed on the monetary amounts (£8 s12 d0 f0.75). Selected gemini-flash's description 'Bensington - 1 1/2 yr' as it perfectly matches the image; other extractors missed parts of the annotation or misread the place name.
gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini agreed on both description and monetary amounts (£3 s0 d5 f0.5), which were visually confirmed. claude-haiku's description was incorrect ('Croft Gazing — Covenants').

All extractors agreed on the monetary amounts (£22 s1 d7). Selected gemini-flash's description 'In Hewin Lodge' as it is the most accurate visual match from the image; other extractors had incorrect place names.

Selected gemini-flash's description 'Little Ew.' as the 'w' is clearly visible in the image, unlike 'Cow.' from gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku. Classified as 'header' (as per gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku) due to its function as a subsection label without monetary amounts.

Selected gemini-flash for description 'Taylor. 2 1/2 yrs' which is fully accurate based on the image. Visually confirmed shillings as '10'; claude-haiku incorrectly read it as '11'. gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini correctly identified the amounts as £20 s10 d3.

Selected gemini-flash's description 'Judge'. Visually confirmed pounds as '10'; claude-haiku incorrectly read it as '12'. All other amounts (s14 d1 f0.5) were consistent across gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini and confirmed by visual inspection.

All extractors agreed on the amounts (£0 s10 d10). Selected gemini-flash's description 'Aitoms' as the most plausible reading; its note acknowledging ambiguity in 'i' and 't' (Aitoms/Acoms) was valuable. Other descriptions ('Storns.', 'Morne.') were not visually supported.

All extractors agreed on the amounts (£2 s0 d2 f0.75). Selected gemini-flash's description 'Hardy' as the most plausible reading; its note on ambiguity for 'dy' vs 'ley' (Hartey/Harley) was insightful. Visually, 'Hardy' is the most convincing interpretation.

All extractors agreed on the monetary amounts (£23 s12 d5). Selected gemini-flash's description 'Kimber.', which was also agreed by gpt-5-mini and confirmed by visual inspection. claude-haiku's 'Kimbier.' was incorrect.

gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini correctly identified the amounts (£25 s16 d0) and the fraction as 0.25 (a quarter/farthing). claude-haiku incorrectly identified the fraction as 0.75. Selected gemini-flash's description 'Busby. (Worley)' as the most accurate visual match.

rows.description: Stipend or Quit Rent for Kidlington Vicarage

Confirmed description 'Stipend or Quit Rent for Kidlington Vicarage' by visual inspection; claude-haiku misread 'Kidlington' as 'Hillingston'.

Selected gemini-flash's transcription as it is the most accurate reading from the image.
